queries.question: What are the course names we have for each school
queries.sql: SELECT Courses.course_name  from Journalism_Schools_Courses join Courses on Journalism_Schools_Courses.course_id = Courses.id join Journalism_Schools on Journalism_Schools_Courses.journalism_schools_id = Journalism_Schools.id   GROUP BY Journalism_Schools_Courses.course_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Journalism_Schools_Courses.journalism_schools_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Journalism_Schools)

queries.question: What are the course names we have for each school
queries.sql: select journalism_schools.name , courses.course_name from Journalism_Schools_Courses join Courses on Journalism_Schools_Courses.course_id = Courses.id join Journalism_Schools on Journalism_Schools_Courses.journalism_schools_id = Journalism_Schools.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?course_name WHERE {
  ?journalism_schools_courses a :Journalism_Schools_Courses .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?journalism_schools_courses p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?journalism_schools a :Journalism_Schools .
  ?journalism_schools_courses p:hasJournalism_Schools ?journalism_schools .
  ?journalism_schools p:name ?name .
  ?courses p:course_name ?course_name .
}

queries.question: For each journalism school, what are the corresponding course descriptions?
queries.sql: select journalism_schools.name , courses.description from Journalism_Schools_Courses join Courses on Journalism_Schools_Courses.course_id = Courses.id join Journalism_Schools on Journalism_Schools_Courses.journalism_schools_id = Journalism_Schools.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?journalism_schools_courses a :Journalism_Schools_Courses .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?journalism_schools_courses p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?journalism_schools a :Journalism_Schools .
  ?journalism_schools_courses p:hasJournalism_Schools ?journalism_schools .
  ?journalism_schools p:name ?name .
  ?courses p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: provide the course description that is common to all journalism schools.
queries.sql: SELECT Courses.description  from Journalism_Schools_Courses join Courses on Journalism_Schools_Courses.course_id = Courses.id join Journalism_Schools on Journalism_Schools_Courses.journalism_schools_id = Journalism_Schools.id   GROUP BY Journalism_Schools_Courses.course_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Journalism_Schools_Courses.journalism_schools_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Journalism_Schools)

queries.question: What are the names and descriptions of courses that are the same at all journalism schools?
queries.sql: SELECT Courses.course_name, Courses.description  from Journalism_Schools_Courses join Courses on Journalism_Schools_Courses.course_id = Courses.id join Journalism_Schools on Journalism_Schools_Courses.journalism_schools_id = Journalism_Schools.id   GROUP BY Journalism_Schools_Courses.course_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Journalism_Schools_Courses.journalism_schools_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Journalism_Schools)

queries.question: Give me the names and descriptions of courses each journalism school offers.
queries.sql: select journalism_schools.name , courses.course_name , courses.description from Journalism_Schools_Courses join Courses on Journalism_Schools_Courses.course_id = Courses.id join Journalism_Schools on Journalism_Schools_Courses.journalism_schools_id = Journalism_Schools.id

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?course_name ?description WHERE {
  ?journalism_schools_courses a :Journalism_Schools_Courses .
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?journalism_schools_courses p:hasCourses ?courses .
  ?journalism_schools a :Journalism_Schools .
  ?journalism_schools_courses p:hasJournalism_Schools ?journalism_schools .
  ?journalism_schools p:name ?name .
  ?courses p:course_name ?course_name .
  ?courses p:description ?description .
}
